name: Tubos Reunidos, S.A.
summary: Tubos Reunidos, S.A. manufactures, processes, and distributes seamless steel pipes in North America, the European Union, the Far East, the Middle East, Africa, and internationally. It offers hot finished and cold drawn seamless tubes in carbon steel and alloyed steel; and hot finished large diameter seamless tubes in carbon, alloyed, high alloyed, and stainless steel. The company's products are used in oil and gas; electrical power generation and heat transfer; and chemical and petrochemical sectors, as well as in machinery and special industrial applications. Tubos Reunidos, S.A. was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Amurrio, Spain.
